---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement for dd40
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you're proposing. What should be added or changed? -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why is this feature useful? What problem does it solve, or what experience does it improve?
     Include any relevant context, such as use cases, user stories, or links to related issues. -->

## Proposed Implementation

<!-- Optional but encouraged: describe how you think this could be implemented.
     For example:
     - Which crate(s) would be affected (dd40_core, dd40_world, dd40_player_input, etc.)?
     - Would a new crate or plugin be appropriate?
     - Are there new block types, systems, or registry entries involved?
     - Any Bevy ECS patterns (events, messages, observers) you have in mind? -->

<!-- List the conditions that must be true for this feature to be considered complete.
     These will directly inform the test cases below. -->

- [ ] <!-- criterion 1 -->
- [ ] <!-- criterion 2 -->

     Include specific steps, inputs, and expected outputs. -->

<!-- Have you thought about other ways to solve this? Why did you prefer the proposed approach? -->
